---
title: "Segmentation Analysis"
---

```{python}
import pandas as pd 
import plotly.express as px 

df = pd.DataFrame(
       { "Cluster": ["0","1","2","3","4"], 
       "Revenue": [1.2e6, 1.2e6, 9.3e6, 2.5e6, 1.6e6], 
       "Customers": [960, 940, 2320, 35, 2], 
       "RPC": [1250, 1275, 4000, 71428, 800000] }
       )
```

## 💰 Revenue Distribution Across Clusters

```{python}
fig = px.bar(
    df,
    x="Cluster",
    y="Revenue",
    text=df["Revenue"].map(lambda x: f"${x/1e6:.1f}M"),
    title="Revenue Distribution Across Clusters"
)

fig.update_traces(textposition="outside")
fig.show()
```

## 👥 Customer Count by Cluster

```{python}
fig = px.bar(
    df,
    x="Cluster",
    y="Customers",
    text="Customers",
    title="Customer Count by Cluster"
)

fig.update_traces(textposition="outside")
fig.show()
```

## 💎 Revenue per Customer

```{python}
fig = px.bar(
    df,
    x="Cluster",
    y="RPC",
    title="Revenue per Customer"
)

fig.update_yaxes(type="log")
fig.show()
```
